app.title: AI Watermark Remover
app.description: Remove visible and invisible AI watermarks from images

upload.title: Upload your image
upload.dropzone: Click to upload or drag and drop
upload.formats: PNG, JPG, or WebP up to 15 MB

detection.title: Detection Results
detection.clean: Your image appears to be clean

mode.title: Choose processing mode
mode.quickDesc: Removes visible AI logos and 'Made with AI' labels, strips metadata
mode.fullDesc: Also disrupts invisible watermarks (SynthID, etc.) via AI regeneration

visible.title: Visible AI Watermarks
visible.desc: Erase visual overlays like the Google Gemini sparkle and Doubao text strips from AI-generated images.

invisible.title: Invisible Watermarks
invisible.desc: Disrupt pixel-level markers like SynthID and StableSignature embedded in AI-generated images.

metadata.title: AI Metadata & Provenance
metadata.desc: Strip C2PA Content Credentials, EXIF AI tags, and PNG text chunks that label images as AI-generated.

q1.q: What does AI Watermark Remover do?
q1.a: It detects and removes AI-related watermarks from images generated by AI models. This includes visible overlays (like the Gemini sparkle), invisible pixel-level watermarks (like SynthID), and embedded metadata (like C2PA manifests and EXIF tags).

q2.a: ChatGPT / DALL-E, Google Gemini, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, Adobe Firefly, xAI Grok, and Doubao. We also handle the C2PA Content Credentials standard used across many AI tools.

q3.q: What's the difference between Quick Clean and All-in-One?
q3.a: Quick Clean removes visible watermarks and metadata on CPU in seconds — it's free. All-in-One adds invisible watermark disruption using AI-powered image regeneration on GPU, which provides more thorough cleaning.

q4.a: PNG, JPEG, and WebP files up to 15 MB in size.

q5.q: Is my data safe? What happens to uploaded images?
q5.a: Your images are processed on our server and automatically deleted within 60 minutes. We never store, share, or sell your images. Processing happens in memory where possible, and temporary files are cleaned up automatically.

q6.a: Yes! Quick Clean mode (visible watermarks + metadata) is completely free. The All-in-One mode for invisible watermarks requires GPU infrastructure and will be available as a paid option in the future.

footer.privacy: Uploaded images are automatically deleted within 60 minutes. We never store or sell your data.
